pg13-p1-s1: worldly clamors, mostly those within myself.
pg13-p1-s2: And so it had been ever since.
pg13-p1: worldly clamors, mostly those within myself. And so it had been ever since. How blind I had been.
pg13-p2-s1: At the hospital I was separated from alcohol for the last time.
pg13-p2-s2:
Treatment seemed wise, for I showed signs of delirium
tremens.
pg13-p2:
At the hospital I was separated from alcohol for the last time. Treatment seemed wise, for I showed signs of delirium
tremens.
pg13-p3-s1: There I humbly offered myself to God, as I then understood Him, to do with me as He would.
pg13-p3-s2:
I placed myself unreservedly
under His care and direction.
pg13-p3-s3: I admitted for the first time that of myself I was nothing; that without Him I was lost.
pg13-p3-s4:
I
ruthlessly faced my sins and became willing to have my new-found Friend take them away, root and branch.
pg13-p3-s5:
I have not had
a drink since.
pg13-p3:
There I humbly offered myself to God, as I then understood Him, to do with me as He would. I placed myself unreservedly
under His care and direction. I admitted for the first time that of myself I was nothing; that without Him I was lost. I
ruthlessly faced my sins and became willing to have my new-found Friend take them away, root and branch. I have not had
a drink since.
pg13-p4-s1: My schoolmate visited me, and I fully acquainted him with my problems and deficiencies.
pg13-p4-s2:
We made a list of people I had
hurt or toward whom I felt resentment.
pg13-p4-s3:
I expressed my entire willingness to approach these individuals, admitting my
wrong.
pg13-p4-s4: Never was I to be critical of them.
pg13-p4-s5: I was to right all such matters to the utmost of my ability.
pg13-p4:
My schoolmate visited me, and I fully acquainted him with my problems and deficiencies. We made a list of people I had
hurt or toward whom I felt resentment. I expressed my entire willingness to approach these individuals, admitting my
wrong. Never was I to be critical of them. I was to right all such matters to the utmost of my ability.
pg13-p5-s1: I was to test my thinking by the new God-consciousness within.
pg13-p5-s2: Common sense would thus become uncommon sense.
pg13-p5-s3:
I was to
sit quietly when in doubt, asking only for direction and strength to meet my problems as He would have me.
pg13-p5-s4:
Never was I
to pray for myself, except as my requests bore on my usefulness to others.
pg13-p5-s5: Then only might I expect to receive.
pg13-p5-s6:
But that
would be in great measure.
pg13-p5:
I was to test my thinking by the new God-consciousness within. Common sense would thus become uncommon sense. I was to
sit quietly when in doubt, asking only for direction and strength to meet my problems as He would have me. Never was I
to pray for myself, except as my requests bore on my usefulness to others. Then only might I expect to receive. But that
would be in great measure.
pg13-p6-s1:
My friend promised when these things were done I would enter upon a new relationship with my Creator; that I would have
the elements of a way of living which answered all my problems.
pg13-p6-s2:
Belief in the power of God, plus enough willingness,
honesty and humility
pg13-p6:
My friend promised when these things were done I would enter upon a new relationship with my Creator; that I would have
the elements of a way of living which answered all my problems. Belief in the power of God, plus enough willingness,
honesty and humility
